description:
The tone modules (pcm_synth.rs, pcm_drum.rs, sn_synth.rs, sn_acoustic.rs,
sn_drum.rs) follow identical patterns:
- parse_*_common() functions with repetitive field extraction
- Address builder functions (sna_common_address, sns_common_address, etc.)
  are boilerplate with only base address differing
- Parameter offset tables could use a declarative macro

Fix: Extract shared parsing helpers. Consider a macro for address builder
generation. Consolidate common parameter extraction patterns.
title: Reduce code duplication in tone parsing modules
